ChatGPT is based on GPT (Generative Pre-trained Transformer) technology, trained on vast amounts of text data to generate intelligent responses. 🧠 How Does ChatGPT Work? ChatGPT uses machine learning, deep learning, and transformer architecture to understand user input and generate relevant responses. It analyzes context and produces meaningful answers within seconds.
title: What is ChatGPT? Powers, Uses & Future Explained
